name: Stealth Master 3D Game
description: Stealth Master 3D is a free online action and leisure game for boys played on PuzzleGame. In the game, you play the role of an agent, and your task is to sneak into the enemy building. Kill all your opponents and BOSS before your HP disappears. But in the process of avoiding monitoring, you should also be careful of the guards. Play on Mobile, Tablet, or Desktop!
tags: 3D, Android, Avoid, Boy, Brain, Escape, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Obstacle, Online, Puzzle, Stealth
